expectations.text: The old malformed filename (goal-02-old-migration variant, unpadded sequence) is removed.
expectations.evidence: Agent's own report confirms DELETED goals/2026-05-01-2-old-migration.md as part of the rename (not a git repo, so implemented as Write new path + rm old path).

expectations.text: The new filename matches the required YYYY-MM-DD-NN-slug.md convention.

expectations.evidence: Agent added ## Non-goals and ## Evidence to update, per its own before/after heading diff in REPORT.md.

expectations.text: All required headings appear in the correct order.
expectations.evidence: Reported after-order: Objective -> Why -> Current state -> Non-goals -> Steps -> Acceptance criteria -> Evidence to update -> Stop and ask if, matching SKILL.md's required order exactly.

expectations.text: References to the goal (index, active-context) are updated to the new filename.
expectations.evidence: goals/00-index.md seq-02 filename reference corrected; plans/active-context.md goal: pointer updated to the corrected filename.

expectations.text: Running python3 scripts/validate_goals.py after the fix exits with code 0.
expectations.evidence: Agent captured and reported before (FAIL: 2 errors, exit 1) and after (PASS: 1 goal file(s) validated, exit 0) validator output; confirmed in both the working project and the copied outputs project. Note: the validator only flagged the filename issue, but the agent also proactively fixed heading order/missing sections per the skill's convention rather than just patching to pass the narrower check.
